news.title: Bitcoin ETFs shed a record $6.4B in 30 days amid crypto winter chill
news.summary: US-listed spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds saw their biggest 30-day net outflow since launching in 2024, coming as Bitcoin fell 17% over the past month.
